---
title: "2026_06_MSsTMT_ModelCoef_heatmaps_v3.2.2_1pspg_EEAge"
author: "Stephanie Huang"
date: "2026-06-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#load rda or read in csvs
load("output/MSstatsTMT/comp/model_outputs/2026_06_05_1pspg_msstats_v3.2.2_t1_EExAge_mapped_model_coef.rda")
load("output/MSstatsTMT/comp/2025_12_31_1pspg_v3.2.2_t1_EExAge_mapped_comp.rda")

```

```{r}
mapped_coef <- mapped_all_coefs %>%
  select(Estimate:model_type, gene, description) %>%
  rename(p.val = "Pr(>|t|)", # new = old
         std.error = "Std. Error") %>%
  
  mutate(Group = case_when(
    term == "(Intercept)" ~ "EE_OLD", # Intercept anchored to EE_OLD
    term == "GroupEE_YNG" ~ "EE_YNG",
    term == "GroupSH_OLD" ~ "SH_OLD",
    term == "GroupSH_YNG" ~ "SH_YNG")) %>%
  
  mutate(est_2 = ifelse(Group == "EE_OLD", 0, Estimate)) # if EE_OLD = 0, rest leave as

  
```

```{r}
mapped_coef$Group <- factor(mapped_coef$Group,
                            levels = c("EE_YNG", "EE_OLD", "SH_YNG", "SH_OLD"))
```


```{r}
mapped_coef_stats <- mapped_coef %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(sum = sum(Estimate),
            sd = sd(Estimate),
            mean = mean(Estimate),
            median = median(Estimate))

```





```{r}
EE_sig <- mapped_comp_v3.2.2_EExAge_t1 %>%
  filter(Label == "H_EE_vs_SH" & adj.pvalue < 0.2) %>%
  pull(Protein)
```

- <https://r-graph-gallery.com/79-levelplot-with-ggplot2.html>
- <https://r-graph-gallery.com/line-chart-dual-Y-axis-ggplot2.html>

```{r}
# my_prot_desc <- mapped_coef[, c("description", "gene")]
```

```{r}
heat_map_EE <- mapped_coef %>%
  filter(protein %in% EE_sig) %>%

ggplot(aes(x = Group, y = description, fill= est_2)) + 
 geom_tile(color = "grey10") +
 geom_text(aes(label = paste0("est = ",round(Estimate,2), ", se = ",round(std.error,2), ", p = ",round(p.val,3))),
           size = 2, fontface = "italic") + 
 colorspace::scale_fill_continuous_diverging("Blue-Red") +
 theme_minimal() +
 theme(
   # panel.grid = element_blank(),
   legend.position = "none"
   )


heat_map_EE
# 2026_06_05_EE_coef_heatmap_geom_tile_p.1_24.pdf # p.1 24
# 2026_06_05_EE_coef_heatmap_geom_tile_p.05_16.pdf # p.05 16
# 2026_06_05_EE_coef_heatmap_geom_tile_p.2_41.pdf # p.2 41
```

Age

```{r}
Age_sig <- mapped_comp_v3.2.2_EExAge_t1 %>%
  filter(Label == "A_YNG_vs_OLD" & adj.pvalue < 0.01) %>%
  pull(Protein)
```

```{r}
heat_map_Age <- mapped_coef %>%
  filter(protein %in% Age_sig) %>%

ggplot(aes(x = Group, y = description, fill= est_2)) + 
 geom_tile(color = "grey10") +
 geom_text(aes(label = paste0("est = ",round(Estimate,2), ", se = ",round(std.error,2), ", p = ",round(p.val,3))),
           size = 2, fontface = "italic") + 
 colorspace::scale_fill_continuous_diverging("Blue-Red") +
 theme_minimal() +
 theme(
   # panel.grid = element_blank(),
   legend.position = "none"
   )

heat_map_Age
# 2026_06_05_Age_coef_heatmap_geom_tile_test_p.01_74.pdf
```
